name: Canvas2D Endless Top-down
description: Reusable, config-driven endless top-down survival/dodger: the world scrolls downward, the player moves freely in 2D to dodge obstacles and grab pickups, score grows with distance survived plus pickups, difficulty ramps over time, lives and game over. No shooting. Procedural fallback graphics; standalone browser export.
capabilities: free 2D keyboard movement within the screen (dodge-only, no shooting)
obstacle types spawned at a ramping rate, with optional per-type speed bonus
score from distance survived plus pickups
difficulty ramp (scroll speed + spawn rate) with an optional cap
lives, respawn invulnerability, game over, restart
standalone export (relative paths, no server calls)
constraints: vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only — no Node, npm or frameworks
configuration-driven: generators produce JSON matching schema.json, never runtime code
relative asset paths only; missing sprites fall back to procedural drawings
